title: Mobile user changes the Lens tenant, the change in the mobile app
scenario: Mobile app should display updated tenant information (tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID) on the Poly Support/App page after switching Lens tenants, either automatically (if invite accepted in-app) or after restart (if invite accepted externally).
steps: 1. Have a mobile user on a current Lens tenant.
2. Change the user's Lens tenant by accepting an invite to another Lens tenant.
3. If the invite is accepted within the mobile app, verify the change is applied automatically.
4. If the invite is accepted via an external source (e.g., laptop), restart the mobile app.
5. After switching tenants, navigate to the Poly Support/App page.
6. Verify the app data displays the new tenant information: tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, and app ID.
expected: The mobile app reflects the tenant change. If accepted in-app, the change applies automatically. If accepted externally, the change applies after restart. The Poly Support/App page shows the new tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, and app ID.
